name: Abundance
instructions: The next time you gain an Action card: +1 Buy and +$3.

name: Amphora
instructions: Either now or at the start of your next turn: +1 Buy and +$3.

name: Avoid
instructions:
+1 Buy
The next time you shuffle this turn, pick up to 3 of those cards to put into your discard pile.

name: Buried Treasure
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, +1 Buy and +$3.
-----
When you gain this, play it.

name: Bury
instructions:
+1 Buy
Put any card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

name: Cabin Boy
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
At the start of your next turn, choose one: +$2; or trash this to gain a Duration card.

name: Cage
instructions: Set aside up to 4 cards from your hand face down (on this). The next time you gain a Victory card, trash this, and put the set aside cards into your hand at end of turn.

name: Cheap
instructions: Cheap cards cost $1 less.

name: Crew
instructions:
+3 Cards
At the start of your next turn, put this onto your deck.

name: Crucible
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. +$1 per $1 it costs.

name: Cursed
instructions: When you gain a Cursed card, gain a Loot and a Curse.

name: Cutthroat
instructions:
Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.
The next time anyone gains a Treasure costing $5 or more, gain a Loot.

name: Deliver
instructions:
+1 Buy
This turn, each time you gain a card, set it aside, and put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Doubloons
instructions:
$3
-----
When you gain this, gain a Gold.

name: Endless Chalice
instructions:
Now and at the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game:
$1
+1 Buy

name: Enlarge
instructions: Now and at the start of your next turn: Trash a card from your hand, and gain one costing up to $2 more.

name: Fated
instructions: When shuffling, you may look through the cards and reveal Fated cards to put them on the top or bottom.

name: Fawning
instructions: When you gain a Province, gain a Fawning card.

name: Figurehead
instructions:
$3
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Figurine
instructions:
+2 Cards
You may discard an Action card for +1 Buy and +$1.

name: First Mate
instructions: Play any number of Action cards with the same name from your hand, then draw until you have 6 cards in hand.

name: Flagship
instructions:
+$2
The next time you play a non-Command Action card, replay it.

name: Foray
instructions: Discard 3 cards, revealing them. If they have 3 different names, gain a Loot.

name: Fortune Hunter
instructions:
+$2
Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may play a Treasure from them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Friendly
instructions: At the start of your Clean-up phase, you may discard a Friendly card to gain a Friendly card.

name: Frigate
instructions:
+$3
Until the start of your next turn, each time another player plays an Action card, they discard down to 4 cards in hand afterwards.

name: Gondola
instructions:
Either now or at the start of your next turn: +$2.
-----
When you gain this, you may play an Action card from your hand.

name: Grotto
instructions:
+1 Action
Set aside up to 4 cards from your hand face down (on this). At the start of your next turn, discard them, then draw as many.

name: Hammer
instructions:
$3
Gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Harbor Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
After the next Action you play this turn, if it gave you +$, +$1.

name: Hasty
instructions: When you gain a Hasty card, set it aside, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Inherited
instructions: Setup: You start the game with an Inherited card in place of a starting card you choose.

name: Insignia
instructions:
$3
This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Inspiring
instructions: After playing an Inspiring card on your turn, you may play an Action from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.

name: Invasion
instructions: You may play an Attack from your hand. Gain a Duchy. Gain an Action onto your deck. Gain a Loot; play it.

name: Jewelled Egg
instructions:
$1
+1 Buy
-----
When you trash this, gain a Loot.

name: Jewels
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
At the start of your next turn, put this on the bottom of your deck.

name: Journey
instructions: You don't discard cards from play in Clean-up this turn. Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

name: King's Cache
instructions: You may play a Treasure from your hand 3 times.

name: Landing Party
instructions:
+2 Cards
+2 Actions
The next time the first card you play on a turn is a Treasure, put this onto your deck afterwards.

name: Launch
instructions: Once per turn: Return to your Action phase. +1 Card, +1 Action, and +1 Buy.

name: Longship
instructions:
+2 Actions
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.

name: Loot
instructions: Setup: If any Kingdom cards give Loot, shuffle the Loot cards and set them out near the Supply.

name: Looting
instructions: Gain a Loot.

name: Maelstrom
instructions: Trash 3 cards from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand trashes one of them.

name: Mapmaker
instructions:
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put 2 into your hand and discard the rest.
-----
When any player gains a Victory card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Maroon
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. +2 Cards per type it has (Action, Attack, etc.).

name: Mining Road
instructions:
+1 Action
+1 Buy
+$2
Once this turn, when you gain a Treasure, you may play it.

name: Mirror
instructions:
+1 Buy
The next time you gain an Action card this turn, gain a copy of it.

name: Nearby
instructions: When you gain a Nearby card, +1 Buy.

name: Orb
instructions: Look through your discard pile. Choose one: Play an Action or Treasure from it; or +1 Buy and +$3.

name: Patient
instructions: At the start of your Clean-up phase, you may set aside Patient cards from your hand to play them at the start of your next turn.

name: Pendant
instructions: +$1 per differently named Treasure you have in play.

name: Peril
instructions: You may trash an Action card from your hand to gain a Loot.

name: Pickaxe
instructions:
$1
Trash a card from your hand. If it costs $3 or more, gain a Loot to your hand.

name: Pilgrim
instructions:
+4 Cards
Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Pious
instructions: When you gain a Pious card, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Prepare
instructions: Set aside your hand face up. At the start of your next turn, play those Actions and Treasures in any order, then discard the rest.

name: Prize Goat
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
You may trash a card from your hand.

name: Prosper
instructions: Gain a Loot, plus any number of differently named Treasures.

name: Puzzle Box
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
You may set aside a card from your hand face down. Put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Quartermaster
instructions: At the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game, choose one: Gain a card costing up to $4, setting it aside on this; or put a card from this into your hand.

name: Reckless
instructions: Follow the instructions of played Reckless cards twice. When discarding one from play, return it to its pile.

name: Rich
instructions: When you gain a Rich card, gain a Silver.

name: Rope
instructions:
$1
+1 Buy
At the start of your next turn, +1 Card and you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Rush
instructions:
+1 Buy
The next time you gain an Action card this turn, play it.

name: Sack of Loot
instructions:
$1
+1 Buy
Gain a Loot.

name: Scrounge
instructions: Choose one: Trash a card from your hand; or gain an Estate from the trash, and if you did, gain a card costing up to $5.

name: Search
instructions:
+$2
The next time a Supply pile empties, trash this and gain a Loot.

name: Secluded Shrine
instructions:
+$1
The next time you gain a Treasure, trash up to 2 cards from your hand.

name: Sextant
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard any number. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Shaman
instructions:
+1 Action
+$1
You may trash a card from your hand.
-----
In games using this, at the start of your turn, gain a card from the trash costing up to $6.

name: Shield
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
-----
When another player plays an Attack, you may first reveal this from your hand to be unaffected.

name: Shy
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may discard one Shy card for +2 Cards.

name: Silver Mine
instructions: Gain a Treasure costing less than this to your hand.

name: Siren
instructions:
Each other player gains a Curse. At the start of your next turn, draw until you have 8 cards in hand.
-----
When you gain this, trash it unless you trash an Action from your hand.

name: Spell Scroll
instructions: Trash this to gain a cheaper card. If it's an Action or Treasure, you may play it.

name: Staff
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
You may play an Action from your hand.

name: Stowaway
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.
-----
When anyone gains a Duration card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Swamp Shacks
instructions:
+2 Actions
+1 Card per 3 cards you have in play (round down).

name: Sword
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand.

name: Taskmaster
instructions: +1 Action, +$1, and if you gain a card costing exactly $5 this turn, then at the start of your next turn, repeat this ability.

name: Tireless
instructions: When you discard a Tireless card from play, set it aside, and put it onto your deck at end of turn.

name: Tools
instructions: Gain a copy of a card anyone has in play.

name: Trickster
instructions: Each other player gains a Curse. Once this turn, when you discard a Treasure from play, you may set it aside. Put it in your hand at end of turn.

name: Wealthy Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
When you gain this, if you have at least 3 differently named Treasures in play, gain a Loot.
